rulings.Case Title: DALE DUNCAN ET AL VS. ANNE KIHAGE ET AL

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 8, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANT ANNE KIHAGE, ZORIALL LLC, CHRISTINA MWANGI Notice Of Motion For Specification Of Reasons For The Courts Order DENIED. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DALE DUNCAN ET AL VS. ANNE KIHAGE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Judgment Creditors Notice Of Motion In Support Of Objection And Objection To The Form Substance And Amount And Sufficiency Thereof Of The Judgment Debtors Undertaking Served June 10 2019
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 8, 2019 line 1. PLAINTIFF DALE DUNCAN, MARTA MUNOZ MENDOZA Judgment Creditors Notice Of Motion In Support Of Objection And Objection To The Form Substance And Amount And Sufficiency Thereof Of The Judgment Debtors Undertaking Served June 10 2019 continued to July 12, 2019. No later than noon on July 10, 2019 judgement debtor to submit a supplemental brief addressing in detail the procedure for the judgment creditor is to follow to collect the undertaking in the event sureties fail to voluntarily cover the undertaking. The brief shall separately cover each interest in each property by each surety. Judgement creditor may file a supplemental reply by July 11, 2019 to address the supplemental opposition. Additionally, parties should meet and confer to agree on a disinterested person to appraise the value of the properties and the value of the sureties' interests in the properties. If parties cannot agree on an independent appraiser, each party to provide names of at least 1 (not more than 3) independent appraisers ready and willing to conduct the appraisal immediately by noon on July 11, 2019. Parties to provide a time estimate for the appraisal. All sureties to be present at the hearing on July 12, 2019. The Court may conduct an evidentiary hearing. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: POODLES, INC., VS. ROGER C. KUHN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant All Animals Properties, Lp, 1333 Ninth Avenue Llc, All Animals Emergency Hospital, Inc., Notice Of Motion To Vacate Courts Order Of April 22, 2016
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 8, 2019 line 2. DEFENDANT ROGER KUHN, MICHAEL INA, EUGENE LYNCH, SHERMAN WONG, LAWRENCE BENNETT, ALL ANIMALS PROPERTIES, LP, 1333 NINTH AVENUE, LLC, ALL ANIMALS EMERGENCY HOSPITAL, INC., JOSEPH LYNCH Defendant All Animals Properties, Lp, 1333 Ninth Avenue Llc, All Animals Emergency Hospital, Inc., Notice Of Motion To Vacate Courts Order Of April 22, 2016 continued to July 12, 2019. By no later than 2:00 p.m. on July 9, 2019 moving party to provide an estimate of the defense costs from July 8, 2019 to (but not including) trial. The estimate shall include the tasks for to be performed and an estimation of fees for each task. Information shall be provided by declaration and include a comprehensible chart with columns for task, dates, estimated fees and costs. By no later than July 11, 2019 by 2:00 p.m. Plaintiff may file a response not to exceed 2 pages, format per CRC 2.100 et seq. Further by no later than July 9, 2019 by 2:00 p.m. Plaintiff to provide a courtesy copy of its opposition filed on July 2, 2019 properly formatted per CRC 2.100 et seq. No substantive changes are allowed, except identifying (by crossing-out, bolding, or in any other manner) lines over the 15 page limit (the Court estimates 152 lines) that the Court should not be considering. The Court is inclined to disregard the last pages including the signature line. = (501/CFH)
